entities.name: PENINSULAR INDIA
entities.description: A major relevant region in South India where the study on labour use and technologies is conducted

entities.name: LAND, WATER, AND CROP-MANAGEMENT TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Prospective agricultural technologies being researched at ICRISAT to improve farming practices

entities.name: VILLAGE LABOUR-USE PATTERNS
entities.description: The existing ways in which human labour is utilized within village farming systems

entities.name: TANK AND WELL IRRIGATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Existing irrigation infrastructures that demonstrate significant employment-creating potential

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A specific type of soil found in peninsular India where irrigation systems and new technologies impact employment

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: Deep clay soils in peninsular India where prospective technologies are expected to significantly increase employment

entities.name: IMPROVED WATERSHED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Advanced water management technologies that may lead to labour shortages during peak times

entities.name: FARM LABOUR BOTTLENECKS
entities.description: Situations where the demand for labour exceeds availability, potentially caused by improved watershed technologies

entities.name: WAGE RATES
entities.description: The payment rates for farm labour, which are expected to increase due to labour bottlenecks

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT POTENTIALS
entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems and technologies to create jobs

entities.name: DOUBLE-CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two crops per year on the same piece of land to increase yields

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same field to increase yields

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: SELECTIVE MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The targeted use of machinery for specific agricultural operations to overcome labour bottlenecks

entities.name: THRESHING
entities.description: The process of separating grain from a plant, identified as a candidate for selective mechanization
